node.content-desc: 香港华美达海景酒店-建筑夜景(打卡点)

node.text: <font size="32">香港华美达海景酒店-建</font>
<font size="32">筑夜景(打卡点)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Ramada Hong Kong Harbour View - Construction Company JeGing (DaaKaaDim)</font>
皇后大道西与东边街交叉口西40米
<font size="32">7-ELEVEn(好时大厦西南)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> 7-ELEVEn (Southwest to Honytex Building)</font>
<font size="32">Man Sang Co</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Man Sang Co</font>
东边街与皇后大道西交叉口西北20米
<font size="32">Kung Fu Tea(Tak Lee Building)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Kung Fu Tea (Tak Lee Building)</font>
卑路乍街与西祥街交叉口东北60米

node.content-desc: 搜索框，730路(高新大道南--阳光路东)
